anchor_points.label: pre_s2
anchor_points.note: equity at start of S2 session (= equity after S1/2026-06-05)

periods.label: Contaminated sessions
periods.explanation: Pre-fix sessions. Bug C (midpoint exit pricing) understated losses. 2026-06-03 had additional defects.

periods.label: 2026-06-04 session (Bug D)
periods.explanation: Bug D (duplicate exit orders) created an inadvertent short position that likely expired at small credit. Bug C was fixed on this date.

periods.label: Clean sessions S1-S5
periods.explanation: Multi-day EOD limit orders (S3 SMH, S4 DIA) may have filled at slightly better prices. Integer-dollar ledger tracking vs Alpaca cent-precision. All sessions verified by post-session reports.

per_session.notes: Bug C active. Actual loss likely larger than ledger.
Bug C active. 2 exits via midpoint pricing. Actual loss likely larger.
Bug C active. 3 exits via midpoint pricing. Actual loss likely larger.
Actual P&L = -$22.00 (AMZN -$6 missing from ledger + META midpoint vs bid -$4). Ledger understated by $10.
Bug C fixed. Bug D (duplicate exits) present. Ledger manually corrected from session report. Actual loss $462.52 (derived).
First clean session. All fills via Pattern A reconciler recovery. Verified by post-session report.
Clean session. Equity start from Alpaca API. daily_pnl vs sum of fills: MATCH.
Clean session. SMH was 2-DTE (exp 2026-06-12). EOD exit limit at $6.56. P&L verified.
Clean session. DIA was next-day expiry (exp 2026-06-12). EOD exit at $1.41. P&L verified.
Clean session. 5/5 clean sessions complete. Historical analysis triggered.

gap_attribution.source: 2026-06-03: AMZN fill not tracked by FillTracker
gap_attribution.evidence: post_session_report_2026-06-03.md: AMZN actual P&L -$6.00, not in ledger
gap_attribution.mechanism: FillTracker 422 race condition. Broker had filled the order but returned 422 on cancel; re-check showed CANCELLED (race condition), fill never recorded. No reconciler active at this point.
Bug C: exit P&L computed using midpoint ($0.39) instead of bid ($0.35). Diff = $0.04 × 100 = $4.00

gap_attribution.evidence: 2026-06-04 post-session report confirms Bug C was present and fixed. No per-session logs for these dates.
gap_attribution.mechanism: Bug C active in all pre-2026-06-04 code. Exit P&L used midpoint instead of bid at exit. Actual losses were larger than ledger records. 6 total exits across 3 sessions.

gap_attribution.evidence: Period B anchor calculation (derived actual loss $462.52 vs ledger $468.00)
gap_attribution.mechanism: Bug D created duplicate exit order(s). One exit may have created an inadvertent short option position that expired at small credit, reducing net account loss vs tracked.

gap_attribution.evidence: Period C anchor calculation (derived actual loss $258.89 vs ledger $276.00)
gap_attribution.mechanism: EOD limit orders on multi-day positions (S3 SMH 2-DTE, S4 DIA next-day) may have filled at better prices than limit. Alpaca cent-precision vs integer-dollar ledger tracking. Equity snapshot timing relative to position settlement.

db_state.note: DB was reset before 2026-06-10. All pre-2026-06-10 sessions have no DB records. All Pattern A (reconciler-recovered) fills across clean sessions produced no closed rows and no realized_pnl. The reconciler journal restore fix (implemented in this branch) addresses future sessions.
db_state.pattern_a_impact_on_db: realized_pnl=null for all 14 filled trades in clean sessions S1-S5. Does not affect ledger accuracy (manually tracked) but means DB cannot be used as source of truth for historical P&L until the fix is deployed and exercised.

defects.description: Exit P&L computed using midpoint instead of bid

defects.ledger_impact: manually corrected to -$468.00; actual slightly different

defects.description: FillTracker 422 race condition: fill not recorded when cancel returns 422 but re-check shows CANCELLED
Reconciler-recovered fills bypass journal exit recording (journal_id=null, realized_pnl never written)
defects.ledger_impact: No ledger impact (manual tracking). DB has no realized_pnl for any fills. Fix ensures future sessions write complete DB records.
